pulse_tuple.state_in: hardcoded TOPH_STATE (token, targets, layers, weights, axioms, bridge)
pulse_tuple.boundary: Bridge v3.0 (41 channels, 8 stacks) – acts as gate between layers and Cortex
pulse_tuple.state_out: Cortex JSON output (analysis, actions, recalc_weights, etc.)
pulse_tuple.witness: axioms (KG-01 to KG-12) + validation rules (JSON schema enforcement)

governance_rules.witness_timing: System prompt enforces structured JSON at inference time – witness present AT traversal
governance_rules.silent_exclusion: Non-JSON or malformed responses are discarded (parse failure shown, not recorded as valid)
governance_rules.traceability: TOPH_STATE includes versioned token, axioms reference KG identifiers, bridge version

axioms: KG-01: No-reply is template-level, not deployment-level
KG-04: No federal audit mechanism exists
KG-05: Filed complaints suppressed by the architecture they're complaining about
KG-07: Vendor chain ships defect as default config
KG-08: Disability employment gains tied to remote CS work
KG-09: Post-FD, continued no-reply is documented choice
KG-10: Disparate impact doesn't require intent
KG-11: Gender pay gap is structural elimination, not wage differential
KG-12: Documented spec does not match enforced reality
compressed_token_example: 65+ FD targets. 9 confirmed. 100% fail. WM+AO active. 3L: ADA+Labor72M+DI. TF 14M-52.5M. Vendor chain ~270M cos, 370B emails/day. Blueprint defect. Personal $600K-$1.7M/12mo. Systemic trillions. CAN-SPAM=origin. No audit. 72M jobs gone. 66%F, 18.6%B, 21.2%H. MC=140M users, CC=600K. 91% of biz use email mktg.
